ol.li: Header (0x00): Contains page_type, first_free_block, cell_count, and content_start_offset.
Slot Array: Grows downwards. Contains 2-byte absolute offsets to the start of each cell.
Cell Storage: Grows upwards from the end of the page. This prevents the slot array and data from colliding until the page is truly full.
Alignment: Cells are aligned to 8-byte boundaries; padding is inserted as needed to ensure CPU cache efficiency.
Defragmentation: Deleted cells leave "holes" (Free Space). The content_start_offset in header tracks the top-most allocated byte.
